title: Section 44
content: 1[44. Production of vehicle at the time of registration.-- (1) Subject to such terms and conditions as may be prescribed by the Central Government in this behalf, a motor vehicle sold by an authorised dealer shall not require production before a registering authority for the purposes of registration for the first time. (2) Subject to such terms and conditions as may be prescribed by the State Government, a person in whose name a certificate of registration has been issued shall not be required to produce the vehicle registered or transferred before a registering authority.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by, s. 19, ibid., for section 44 (w.e.f. 1-9-2019).
